ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home/away) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win/loss) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "referee_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of referee IDs for the game */,
  "home_team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team coach */,
  "away_team_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team coach */,
  "game_quarters" TEXT /* JSON string containing detailed quarter-by-quarter scores */,
  "game_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the recorded video of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach of the team */,
  "assistant_coach_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of assistant coach IDs */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate (FTA/FGA) */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Usage percentage */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is affiliated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the coach attended */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* JSON string containing the coach's win-loss record */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Description of the coach's coaching style */,
  "coach_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of officiating experience */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Referee's certification level */,
  "assigned_games" INTEGER /* Number of games the referee has officiated */,
  "referee_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the referee's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of field goals made by the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of three-point field goals made by the team */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rebounds by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the game */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team in the game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_value" INTEGER /* Value of the award (if applicable) */,
  "award_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "date_incurred" TEXT /* Date the injury was incurred */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player's recovery */,
  "injury_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo or scan of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regular season game */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., 1, 2, Finals) */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the playoff game was played */,
  "home_team_seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the home team in the playoffs */,
  "away_team_seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the away team in the playoffs */,
  "playoff_video_url" TEXT /* URL to the recorded video of the playoff game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount sponsored in USD */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo or logo of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the game */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Merchandise sales related to the game */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions about the game */,
  "fan_ratings" REAL /* Average fan rating for the game */,
  "fan_comments" TEXT /* JSON string containing fan comments */,
  "fan_video_url" TEXT /* URL to fan-generated content related to the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
